name: Short Ceramic Vase Wood Grain Pattern - Room Essentials™
description:
Elevate your home decor with this Short Ceramic Vase Wood Grain Pattern from Room Essentials™. This decorative vase features a minimalist design that highlights the natural light wood grain and a gently rounded base in an off-white finish to blend seamlessly with coastal, modern, or neutral decor styles. Watertight and versatile, it can display fresh stems or serve as a striking decorative piece on its own.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
